class.name: MusicNode
class.brief_description: A Node2D used for setting the music track in a [Room].
class.description: [b]Note:[/b] This doesn't need to be set in every room. The music track set by a [b]MusicNode[/b] will stay until it is overridden by another [b]MusicNode[/b].

method.name: change_music
method.description: Changes the global music playing to the given loaded [param music] resource with the given [param gain] and [param pitch] [b]Note:[/b] [param gain] is in linear energy. [codeblock] MusicNode.change_music(load("res://music/mus_intro_test.ogg"), 0.75, 1.17) [/codeblock]
